label: OpenAI loop v3 claim planning
hypothesis: Adding explicit claim-planning and strongest-citation instructions will reduce partial claim support and citation mismatch findings without materially reducing visible-case overall quality.
rollbackReason: Reject if live generated evidence does not beat the stored OpenAI baseline on the partial-support cluster, introduces new unsupported claims, exceeds the generation cost cap, or cannot be promoted with a complete matching visible case set.
